intended_use: BoneView 1.1-US is intended to analyze radiographs using machine learning techniques to identify and highlight fractures during the review of radiographs. BoneView 1.1-US is intended for use as a conc
intended_use_full: BoneView 1.1-US is intended to analyze radiographs using machine learning techniques to identify and highlight fractures during the review of radiographs. BoneView 1.1-US is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid during the interpretation of radiographs. BoneView 1.1-US is for prescription use only.
ground_truth: Panel of three U.S. board-certified radiologists who assigned ground truth labels indicating presence or absence of fractures and their location
other_metrics: Clinical reader study: Reader specificity improved from 0.906 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.898-0.913) unaided to 0.956 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.951-0.960) aided (+5% increase); Reader sensitivity improved from 0.648 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.640-0.656) unaided to 0.752 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.745-0.759) aided (+10.4% increase)
